name: remember_person
description: Capture a fresh snapshot of the person the wearer is pointing at, upload it to the configured Immich account, keep only metadata in OpenVision People Registry, and optionally enroll a local contact identity sample when a name is supplied.
activation_phrases_vi: ghi nhớ người này là Trâm
thêm người này vào danh bạ mặt
acceptance_tests: requests a fresh snapshot through MediaCommand when no preview exists
uploads snapshot bytes to Immich using the configured API key
does not store image bytes in the People Registry DB
records pending face-sync metadata for Face UI and later Immich people sync
optionally enrolls a local identity sample when display_name is supplied
failure_modes: face identity backend unavailable for optional local enrollment
Immich face detection has not yet grouped the uploaded image
